qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications of the H100-1g.10gb GPU instance profile?
qa_pairs.answer: The H100-1g.10gb profile offers 1/8th of the computing power with 10GB of GPU memory.

qa_pairs.question: Could you describe the H100-2g.20gb GPU instance profile?
qa_pairs.answer: The H100-2g.20gb profile provides 2/8th of the computing power with 20GB of GPU memory.

qa_pairs.question: What does the H100-3g.40gb GPU instance profile offer?
qa_pairs.answer: The H100-3g.40gb profile delivers 3/8th of the computing power with 40GB of GPU memory.

qa_pairs.question: How do less powerful MIG profiles affect allocation and priority?
qa_pairs.answer: Using less powerful profiles will have a lower impact on your allocation and priority.

qa_pairs.question: What command can be used to list the available MIG flavours and full-size GPU names on a cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To list all the available MIG flavours and full-size GPU names on a given cluster, you can run the command: `sinfo -o "%G"|grep gpu|sed 's/gpu://g'|sed 's/),/\n/g'|cut -d: -f1|sort|uniq`.
